name: showAnswerFeedback
description: Show immediate visual feedback after evaluating a genuine learner answer. Use correct only for a fully correct answer, not_quite when the core idea is present but incomplete or contains a minor error, and wrong when the answer is materially incorrect. This card must not create an additional retry or reinforcement loop.

parameters.description: The evaluated answer result. Return exactly one of: correct, not_quite, wrong.
Optional short learner-facing explanation. State what was right or which single detail needs correction. Keep it to one concise sentence and do not include internal scoring.
